question: According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year has clearly recorded the fewest sign-ups of any year shown.
options.C: Sign-ups per year have been steadily increasing over the entire period.
options.D: Sign-ups have fallen sharply in the latest year compared to previous years.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 3 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (700 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 2,949 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
